# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We actively support and apply security patches to the following versions of ContractsPulse:

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 1.x.x   | ✅ Yes     |
| < 1.0.0 | ❌ No      |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of ContractsPulse seriously. If you find a security vulnerability, please do **NOT** open a public issue. Instead, report it directly to the repository maintainer.

To report a vulnerability:
1. Email your report to **aayush.mediratta@gmail.com** (or your preferred contact email).
2. Include a detailed description of the vulnerability, the environment where it was reproduced, and step-by-step instructions or proof-of-concept code to trigger the issue.
3. We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and work with you to patch the issue before making it public.
